title: Oil Tanker Booked in Persian Gulf at 897% of Benchmark Rate
title_cn: 波斯湾油轮预订价格为基准价格的 897%
summary: One of the world’s biggest operators of supertankers has provisionally booked a vessel to transport oil from the Persian Gulf to India at nearly nine times benchmark rates, a price that reflects the shortage of avalable ships in the area.

title: CATL Sees Its Sodium Batteries in at Least 10,000 EVs This Year
title_cn: CATL预计今年其钠电池将应用于至少10,000辆电动汽车
summary: Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Ltd. expects 10,000 to 20,000 electric vehicles to carry its sodium-ion batteries this year, a senior official for the Chinese company said.

title: Hedge Funds Look Set to Win Another Exemption From EU ESG Rules
title_cn: 对冲基金有望赢得欧盟 ESG 规则的另一项豁免
summary: Hedge funds are set to be excluded from a requirement that would force investment managers in Europe to categorize whether their products are ESG or not.

title: Stock Rout Pauses as Traders Await Micron Earnings: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于交易员等待美光科技财报，股市暴跌暂停：市场总结
summary: A measure of calm returned to equity markets after a selloff in top-performing technology names, with Micron Technology Inc.’s earnings taking on added significance as a test for the artificial intelligence trade.

title: Micron Earnings Take on New Gravity With Market on Edge Over AI
title_cn: 随着市场对人工智能的关注，美光的盈利呈现出新的吸引力
summary: Micron Technology Inc.’s earnings report on Wednesday afternoon is shaping up to be one of the most important in months as investors find themselves suddenly on edge over the sustainability of the AI rally.

title: Rheinmetall Tumbles as Germany Said to Shelve Warships Contract
title_cn: 德国称搁置军舰合同，莱茵金属公司股价暴跌
summary: Rheinmetall AG shares fell the most in a year on concern the defense firm will come under pressure as Germany plans to withdraw a major warships contract.

title: Tankmaker KNDS Starts Process for Frankfurt, Paris IPO
title_cn: Tankmaker KNDS 启动法兰克福和巴黎 IPO 程序
summary: Tankmaker KNDS started the process to hold an initial public offering in Frankfurt and Paris on Wednesday, a step forward in its development as a pan-European defense company. Bloomberg's Charles Capel reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Says Iran Crisis Shows Nations Must Speed Up Energy Shift
title_cn: 中国称伊朗危机表明各国必须加快能源转型
summary: Oil and gas shortages triggered by the US war against Iran should be a lesson to countries to accelerate their energy transitions, according to China’s climate envoy.

title: Vedanta Eyes $372 Million Raise From Zambia Copper Mines IPO
title_cn: Vedanta 计划通过赞比亚铜矿 IPO 筹集 3.72 亿美元
summary: Vedanta Resources Ltd. plans to sell an 11.9% stake in a US-based unit to raise about $372 million to develop its Zambian copper mining complex.

title: US Diesel Prices Fall Under $5, Easing Inflationary Pressure
title_cn: 美国柴油价格跌至 5 美元以下，缓解通胀压力
summary: The cost of diesel in the US fell below $5 a gallon for the first time since mid-March, offering some relief for one of the global economy’s most important fuels.

title: Xi Pressures Takaichi by Throttling Key Mineral Exports to Japan
title_cn: 习近平通过限制对日本的主要矿产出口向高市施压
summary: China is choking shipments of some critical minerals to Japan, a slowdown that’s hurting companies and prompting calls for Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi to find a diplomatic off-ramp with Beijing.

title: Tankmaker KNDS Kicks Off Process for Frankfurt and Paris IPO
title_cn: 坦克制造商 KNDS 启动法兰克福和巴黎 IPO 流程
summary: Tankmaker KNDS NV started the process to hold an initial public offering in Frankfurt and Paris in the next few weeks as it moves forward with plans to become a pan-European defense company.

title: India Offers Leverage on Forex Deposits to Boost Inflows
title_cn: 印度提供外汇存款杠杆以增加资金流入
summary: India’s central bank allowed lenders to extend loans against foreign-currency deposits raised under a special program offered to overseas citizens, a move that could see billions in dollar inflows over the next few months.

title: Airbus A380 Aircraft Require Checks for Possible Wing Cracks
title_cn: 空客 A380 飞机需要检查机翼是否存在裂纹
summary: The European Union Aviation Safety Agency is asking some operators of Airbus SE A380 jets to perform additional special inspections on their aircraft’s wings after identifying possible cracks in the structure.

title: Volatility Is Now a Feature, Not a Bug: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 波动性现在是一个特性，而不是一个错误：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Guy Johnson, Tom Mackenzie and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BOJ’s Ueda Reiterates Risk of Inflation Exceeding 2% Target
title_cn: 日本央行上田重申通胀率超过 2% 目标的风险
summary: The Bank of Japan sees the risk of inflation exceeding its 2% target and will conduct additional interest-rate hikes appropriately, Governor Kazuo Ueda said in speech Wednesday that reiterated policymakers’ recent messaging.

title: Adani Bets on India Energy Security With Nuclear Power Project
title_cn: 阿达尼通过核电项目押注印度能源安全
summary: Billionaire Gautam Adani said his giant conglomerate will embark on a new 10 gigawatt nuclear power initiative to help improve India’s energy security, in his first public speech since resolving his legal troubles in the US.

title: Asia’s Demand for Middle Eastern Oil Slows After Buying Spree
title_cn: 亚洲对中东石油的需求在疯狂购买后放缓
summary: Asian refiners have slowed purchases of Middle Eastern crude after a buying spree over the past three weeks, with oil majors and traders stepping in to take some of the surplus barrels.

title: Gold Drops Below $4,100 as Stronger Dollar, Rate Outlook Weigh
title_cn: 美元走强、利率前景承压，金价跌破 4,100 美元
summary: Gold fell for a second day, under pressure from a stronger US dollar and a tech-led selloff in equities that’s prompted investors to cut bullion holdings and cover losses elsewhere.

title: Tech Stocks Set to Bounce After $1.3 Trillion Rout on AI Jitters
title_cn: 科技股因人工智能恐慌而暴跌 1.3 万亿美元后将反弹
summary: US technology stocks were set to rebound on Wednesday after concerns around artificial intelligence valuations wiped out nearly $1.3 trillion from the market capitalization of Nasdaq 100 stocks over two days.

title: Chinese Premier Says Tech Industry Not a Global Threat | The China Show 6/24/2026
title_cn: 中国总理表示科技产业不是全球威胁中国展 2026 年 6 月 24 日
summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and Avril Hong give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tuya Sees Growth Despite China Demand Slowdown
title_cn: 尽管中国需求放缓，涂鸦仍实现增长
summary: Tuya Smart, an AI cloud and IoT platform provider, says growth remains strong despite slowing consumer appliance demand in China. Co-founder and COO, Alex Young, joined Bloomberg's Minmin Low on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian and appeared on Insight with Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: PBOC Adviser Sees Potential Rate Cut
title_cn: 中国人民银行顾问认为可能降息
summary: Huang Yiping, a member of the monetary policy committee at the People’s Bank of China, says he sees a potential rate cut this year. He joined Bloomberg's Minmin Low on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian and appeared on Insight with Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 6/24/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 6/24/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: McKinsey’s Ngai on China's 'Opportunity 2.0'
title_cn: 麦肯锡的魏先生谈中国的“机遇2.0”
summary: McKinsey Greater China Chairman, Joe Ngai, says China's “Opportunity 2.0” narrative is gaining prominence as innovation, consumption, and advanced manufacturing reshape its growth outlook. He joined Bloomberg's Minmin Low on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian and appeared on Insight with Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Temasek Unit, Oman Fund Join Vinpearl’s Private Credit Deal
title_cn: 淡马锡子公司和阿曼基金加入 Vinpearl 的私人信贷交易
summary: A unit of Singapore’s Temasek Holdings Pte. and Oman’s sovereign wealth fund are investing in a $255 million private credit financing for Vingroup JSC’s hospitality arm, underscoring continued appetite among state-backed investors in such opportunities in Asia.

title: RBA Cites Phillips Curve in Bet Its Rate Hikes Won’t Hammer Jobs
title_cn: 澳洲联储援引菲利普斯曲线押注加息不会影响就业
summary: Australia’s central bank is betting the interaction between prices and jobs along the Phillips Curve mean its rapid-fire interest rate hikes will damp inflation without pushing unemployment too high, according to Deputy Governor Andrew Hauser.

title: Heat Wave Hits Europe, Causing Disruption
title_cn: 热浪袭击欧洲，造成破坏
summary: Extreme weather will continue across northwest Europe through the weekend, testing temperature records, according to weather models and analysis from meteorologists. London is forecast to breach 35C on Wednesday. Bloomberg's Joe Wertz reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Beijing Unfazed by China Shock 2.0 as Premier Touts Openness
title_cn: 北京未受“中国冲击2.0”影响，总理宣扬开放
summary: Beijing’s No. 2 official played down worries about the disruption wrought by his country’s surging exports on the global economy, instead championing the benefits provided to the world by China’s development.

title: Philippine Tycoon Boosts PhilWeb Investment in Online Gaming Push
title_cn: 菲律宾大亨加大 PhilWeb 在线游戏投资
summary: Philippine tycoon Lance Gokongwei is acquiring a 15% stake in online gaming technology firm PhilWeb Corp., boosting the company’s foray into artificial intelligence and the billionaire’s exposure to the gaming industry.

title: UBS' Fowler Sees Value in US Cyclicals, Pharmaceuticals
title_cn: 瑞银集团的福勒看到了美国周期股和制药业的价值
summary: UBS Chief European Equity Strategist and Head of Derivates Gerry Fowler discusses the factors behind the tech selloff and where he sees value in markets. "You're going to get volatility — this isn't the first time we've seen this," Fowler tells Bloomberg Television. "It's an artifice of market structure that I suspect is not going away." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: German Rail Services Disrupted After Comms System Failure
title_cn: 通信系统故障后德国铁路服务中断
summary: Germany’s national rail operator is struggling to restore regular service after a communications system outage brought trains to a nationwide standstill late Tuesday.

title: Masayoshi Son Calls AI Bubble Talk an ‘Insult,’ Delays Retiring
title_cn: 孙正义称人工智能泡沫谈话是“侮辱”并推迟退休
summary: SoftBank Group Corp.’s Masayoshi Son brushed aside concerns about an AI bubble, saying that such a characterization is inappropriate for a revolution that’s only just begun. He vowed to remain at the helm of his investment group much longer to capitalize on the AI boom.

title: Tencent Testing New AI Agent for WeChat Workplace App
title_cn: 腾讯测试微信办公应用的新人工智能代理
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is preparing to launch an AI agent for its Slack-like enterprise communication app, intensifying a high-stakes battle among Chinese tech giants to lock users into their ecosystems in the post-ChatGPT era.

title: Leveraged Korea ETFs Sold Estimated $6 Billion of Shares in Rout
title_cn: 韩国杠杆 ETF 惨遭出售估计价值 60 亿美元的股票
summary: Leveraged exchange-traded funds tracking Samsung Electronics Co. or SK Hynix Inc. probably sold a combined $6 billion of the Korean chipmakers’ shares Tuesday to maintain their ratios, underscoring such products are amplifying market moves, Bloomberg Intelligence says.

title: CATL's Jun on Sodium-Ion Batteries and AI Technology
title_cn: 宁德时代君谈钠离子电池与AI技术
summary: CATL says it is focusing on deploying sodium-ion batteries this year to meet demand for AI-related energy storage. CATL Chief Manufacturing Officer Ni Jun discusses the battery maker's outlook, as well as the prospect of harnessing computing power from idle electric vehicles. He speaks on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Sells $25 Billion of Bonds, Cuts Interest Costs
title_cn: SpaceX 出售 250 亿美元债券，降低利息成本
summary: SpaceX sold $25 billion of investment-grade bonds on Tuesday, marking the final step to replace the costly debt that had helped finance Elon Musk’s acquisition of X, then known as Twitter, as well as the expensive loans and bonds issued by xAI to bridge its rapid cash drain. Bloomberg's Manuel Baigorri reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Zhipu Said to Weigh Multibillion-Dollar Share Sale in Hong Kong After 2,000% Gain
title_cn: 智普股价上涨 2000% 后称考虑在香港出售数十亿美元的股票
summary: Chinese artificial-intelligence model maker Zhipu is considering a share sale to raise several billion US dollars in Hong Kong, people familiar with the matter said, after soaring 2,000% since its listing in January.

title: Kioxia’s Executive Pay Jumps After AI Boosts Demand and Stock
title_cn: 人工智能提振需求和库存后，铠侠高管薪酬大幅上涨
summary: Executive pay at Japanese flash memory maker Kioxia Holdings Corp. surged, a reflection of runaway global demand for AI-related chips.

title: Bain Capital's Zhu on Investing in China
title_cn: 贝恩资本朱先生谈投资中国
summary:
Jonathan Zhu, Greater China Chairman at Bain Capital, discusses his outlook and strategies for investing in the Chinese market.
He speaks with Stephen Engle on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Philippines Bans GoreBox After Three Killed in School Shooting
title_cn: 菲律宾学校枪击案造成三人死亡后禁止 GoreBox
summary: The Philippine cybercrime agency has temporarily banned online game GoreBox after initial police investigations showed that one of the two students allegedly involved in this week’s school shooting was an avid player.

title: Indian Tech’s Nifty Share Shrinks to Record Low on AI Worries
title_cn: 由于人工智能担忧，印度科技公司 Nifty 的股价跌至历史新低
summary: India’s software exporters are steadily losing their sway on the country’s stock market as concerns over artificial intelligence-led disruption trigger a prolonged selloff in the sector.

title: AirPods Maker Luxshare Gauges Interest for $3 Billion Hong Kong Listing
title_cn: AirPods 制造商立讯精密表示有兴趣在香港上市 30 亿美元
summary: Electronics manufacturer Luxshare Precision Industry Co. has started gauging interest for a Hong Kong listing that may raise about $3 billion, according to people familiar with the matter who asked not to be identified to discuss a private matter, moving toward what could be one of the city’s biggest deals this year.

title: JD.com's Shen on China Economic outlook
title_cn: 京东沉先生谈中国经济前景
summary:
Shen Jianguang, VP and Chief Economist at JD.Com, shares his outlook on China’s economy as the nation accelerates into an AI‑driven era marked by surging demand.
He speaks with Bloomberg's Minmin Low on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian, China on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: WEF Co-chair on Global Economic Outlook
title_cn: 世界经济论坛全球经济展望联合主席
summary:
André Hoffmann, Co-Chair of the World Economic Forum, discusses his outlook for global growth and China's economy amid ongoing conflict in the Middle East and market volatility.
He speaks with Bloomberg's Stephen Engle on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian, China on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk’s SpaceX Adds Billions in Debt While Cutting Interest Costs
title_cn: 马斯克的 SpaceX 在削减利息成本的同时增加了数十亿美元的债务
summary: Elon Musk is no stranger to financial alchemy. His latest feat: adding billions of dollars of debt onto his cash-burning business empire while simultaneously cutting its annual interest burden.

title: Stocks Slide as Wall Street Gets AI Wake-up Call | The Close 06/23/2026
title_cn: 华尔街敲响人工智能警钟，股市下滑收盘价 06/23/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are ProShares Head of Research & CIO, Active Investments Alessio de Longis, Citi Senior Equity Research Analyst Ariel Rosa, JP Morgan Asset Management Global Head of Real Estate Chad Tredway, Permanent Portfolio President & Portfolio Manager Michael Cuggino, Third Bridge Global Head of Sector Analysts Peter McNally, D.A. Davidson Technology Research Head Gil Luria, UBS Senior US Homebuilding Equity Research Analyst John Lovallo, NYC Tourism + Conventions President & CEO Julie Coker, & E11EVEN Miami Operating Partner Gino LoPinto. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Customer Sues US Over Loss of Fable AI Access
title_cn: Anthropic 客户因失去 Fable AI 访问权限而起诉美国
summary: An artificial intelligence startup that uses Anthropic PBC’s AI models sued the US over a government order that the maker of Claude and Mythos keep its most advanced technology out of the hands of foreign nationals.

title: Cerebras Drops After 2026 Sales Outlook Disappoints Investors
title_cn: Cerebras 2026 年销售前景令投资者失望，股价下跌
summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. shares fell about 10% in late trading after the newly public chipmaker gave an annual sales forecast that disappointed investors looking for the company to take a bigger slice of the AI data center market.

title: SpaceX’s $25 Billion Sale Meets Skeptical Eyes of Debt Investors
title_cn: SpaceX 250 亿美元的出售遭到债务投资者的怀疑
summary: Credit-rating firms said SpaceX is a solid investment-grade company. The bond market is taking a more cautious view.

title: Digital Credit Could Be $3T Market: Cole
title_cn: 数字信贷可能是 3T 美元的市场：Cole
summary: Matt Cole, CEO of Strive, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s Instagram Gets Ready to Go Public
title_cn: 中国 Instagram 准备上市
summary: On today’s Big Take Asia podcast, we look at Xiaohongshu’s push to go public and what it reveals about confidence in China’s tech sector.

title: Meta’s Cox Sought Shah’s WhatsApp Advice — Then Made Him Leader
title_cn: Meta 的 Cox 寻求 Shah 的 WhatsApp 建议 –然后任命他为领袖
summary: Meta Platforms Inc.’s decision to hand leadership of WhatsApp to Kunal Shah, one of India’s most prominent angel investors and the founder of fintech startup Cred, started with a cold email.

title: The Growing Crisis for America's Child Abuse Investigators
title_cn: 美国虐待儿童调查人员面临的日益严重的危机
summary: With the proliferation of AI-generated abuse material, police and investigators aren't getting the robust mental health support they need.

title: GameStop CEO Drops $35 Billion Pay Plan to Focus on eBay Bid
title_cn: GameStop CEO 放弃 350 亿美元薪酬计划，专注于 eBay 竞购
summary: GameStop Corp. Chief Executive Officer Ryan Cohen withdrew a bonus plan that could have paid him as much as $35 billion so that his company can be “fully focused on GameStop’s operating performance and its proposed eBay acquisition.”

title: FDA Drops Complaint Against Whoop’s Blood Pressure Tracking Tool
title_cn: FDA 撤销对 Whoop 血压追踪工具的投诉
summary: The US Food and Drug Administration dropped its complaint against fitness tracker brand Whoop Inc. over its blood-pressure tracking tool, marking an about-face after the agency initially asked the company to disable it.

title: China Detained Two Japanese in May on Suspicion of Smuggling
title_cn: 中国5月拘留两名涉嫌走私的日本人
summary: China detained two Japanese nationals in May on suspicion of smuggling prohibited goods, adding to ongoing diplomatic tensions between the two nations.

title: China Makes New US Warship Target for Missile Tests, Images Show
title_cn: 图片显示，中国将美国军舰作为导弹试验的新目标
summary: China has built a new US destroyer replica at a remote missile-testing site in its northwestern desert, satellite imagery shows, a target analysts say could be used to test anti-ship weapons.

title: Netherlands Lobbies US to Drop Chip Curbs Targeting ASML Sales
title_cn: 荷兰游说美国放弃针对 ASML 销售的芯片限制
summary: The Netherlands is lobbying the US to not expand export controls on semiconductor equipment, a move that would constrain ASML Holding NV’s ability to sell to China.

title: Johannesburg Halts Roads Services as It Can’t Pay for Fuel
title_cn: 约翰内斯堡因无法支付燃油费用而停止道路服务
summary: Johannesburg Roads Agency, which is responsible for maintaining the street network in South Africa’s biggest city, has halted all services because it can’t pay for fuel.

title: Berkeley Lays Out Steps to Revive UK Housing as Profit Drops 15%
title_cn: 利润下降 15% 伯克利制定复苏英国房地产业的措施
summary: Berkeley Group Holdings Plc laid out a series of measures it said the UK government should focus on to help revive homebuilding, as the ruling Labour party kicks off a process to find a successor to Prime Minister Keir Starmer.

title: Germany Said to Retreat From Troubled Frigate After Delays
title_cn: 据称德国将在延误后从陷入困境的护卫舰撤退
summary: Germany is set to shelve the purchase of six F126 anti-submarine warships, according to people familiar with the plan, aborting what stood to be the largest procurement project in the history of the country’s navy.

title: Burnham’s Route to Downing Street Clears as Rival Steps Aside
title_cn: 随着竞争对手的退让，伯纳姆通往唐宁街的路线畅通无阻
summary: Andy Burnham is all but certain to become the UK’s next prime minister after Darren Jones, who had been talked up as a potential rival, said he would not launch his own leadership bid.

title: Micron Earnings to Test Tech Sector After Global Selloff | Daybreak Europe 6/24/2026
title_cn: 全球抛售后，美光科技盈利将考验科技行业黎明欧洲 6/24/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

President Donald Trump said Iran will be able to use funds released from frozen accounts only to purchase food and medical supplies from the US, seeking to ease concerns about peace negotiations that both sides say are making progress.

And SpaceX sold $25 billion of investment-grade bonds, marking the final step to replace the costly debt that had helped finance Musk’s 2022 acquisition of X, then known as Twitter, as well as the expensive loans and bonds issued by artificial intelligence lab xAI last year to bridge its rapid cash drain.

Today's guest: Josie Anderson, European Economist, Nomura (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mamdani Picks Win Democratic Congressional Primaries
title_cn: 马姆达尼选择赢得民主党国会初选
summary: Three candidates endorsed by Zohran Mamdani swept to victory in Democratic congressional primaries on Tuesday, showing that the coalition which powered the New York City mayor to a surprising victory last year is gaining strength. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran, US Make Conflicting Claims About Key Issues
title_cn: 伊朗和美国就关键问题提出相互矛盾的主张
summary: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian says the nation's missile program is not part of its memorandum of understanding with the US. Iran also disputed President Donald Trump's claim that the nation will be able to use funds released from frozen accounts only to purchase food and medical supplies from the US. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NATO's Rutte to Meet Trump as E5 Leaders Gather in Berlin
title_cn: 北约领导人吕特将在欧洲五国领导人齐聚柏林时会见特朗普
summary: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte is set to meet US President Donald Trump Wednesday. The meeting takes place ahead of the NATO summit in Ankara which starts on July 7. Meanwhile German Chancellor Friedrich Merz hosts a meeting in Berlin with fellow leaders from France, Italy, the UK and Poland. Bloomberg's Rosalind Mathieson reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Germany Sticks to Plan for Cuts in Drug Prices Despite US Probe
title_cn: 尽管美国调查，德国仍坚持降低药品价格的计划
summary: Germany signaled it will move ahead with plans to impose lower drug prices on pharmaceutical companies, calling a US accusation of unfair trade practices “unfounded.”

title: Trump Defends Unfreezing Iran Funds as Senate Rebukes Him on War
title_cn: 特朗普为解冻伊朗资金辩护，参议院谴责他的战争
summary: President Donald Trump said Iran will be able to use funds released from frozen accounts only to purchase food and medical supplies from the US, seeking to ease concerns about peace negotiations that both sides say are making progress.

title: EU Rides Out Budget Spat Without Spooking Markets or Ratings
title_cn: 欧盟安然度过了预算争端，没有惊动市场或评级
summary: The European Union’s regime for monitoring public finances has arguably just passed its toughest health test since a revamp after the pandemic.

title: Canada to Send Warships to Indo-Pacific, Defense Minister Says
title_cn: 国防部长称加拿大将向印度太平洋地区派遣军舰
summary: Canada plans to send warships to the Indo-Pacific in two deployments this year, its defense minister said, part of a move to deepen military ties with regional allies even as Ottawa also endeavors to build closer trade relations with China.

title: NY Races Show Anti-Establishment Anger as Mamdani Picks Win
title_cn: 纽约赛马表现出反建制愤怒，马姆达尼选择获胜
summary: Three candidates endorsed by Zohran Mamdani swept to victory in Democratic congressional primaries on Tuesday, showing that the coalition which powered the New York City mayor to a surprising victory last year is gaining strength.

title: Conservative Fujimori Poised to Win Peru’s Presidency, Vote Count Shows
title_cn: 计票显示保守派藤森有望赢得秘鲁总统职位
summary: Conservative Keiko Fujimori is poised to become Peru’s next president after running her fourth consecutive campaign, according to figures published by the elections regulator after weeks of adjudicating disputed ballots.

title: Army Veteran Conley Projected to Win NY Race, Face GOP’s Lawler
title_cn: 退伍军人康利预计将赢得纽约竞选，面对共和党的劳勒
summary: Cait Conley is projected to win the Democratic primary in a swing district in New York’s Hudson Valley, pitting the former Army special operations director against one of the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress this November.

title: North Korea Deploys New Destroyer, Vows to Push for Nuclear Navy
title_cn: 朝鲜部署新型驱逐舰，誓言推动核海军发展
summary: North Korea has commissioned its first 5,000-ton class destroyer as leader Kim Jong Un vowed to build more ships up to twice that size and equip the navy with nuclear weapons.

title: Bessent Signals Confidence in Warsh, Sees Inflation Coming Down
title_cn: 贝森特表示对沃什充满信心，预计通胀将会下降
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent signaled confidence in newly installed Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh during remarks Tuesday, and predicted that inflation will retreat as the Iran conflict subsides.

title: Bessent Says US Shouldn't Be at 'Mercy of Foreign Chokepoint'
title_cn: 贝森特称美国不应任由“外国阻塞点摆布”
summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says economic statecraft policies will be guided in part by ensuring the nation addresses vulnerabilities to any adversary being able to curtail vital supplies. Bessent speaks at the Economic Club of New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Trade Chief Greer in India to Resolve Trade Pact Hurdles
title_cn: 美国贸易首席格里尔在印度解决贸易协定障碍
summary: US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer and Indian officials stepped up efforts to strengthen economic ties as they sought to resolve the remaining differences holding up an interim trade agreement, with talks extending into Wednesday.

title: Senate Votes to Limit Trump's Iran War Powers | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/23/2026
title_cn: 参议院投票限制特朗普的伊朗战争权力权力平衡：最新版 06/23/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Democratic Senator Angela Alsobrooks of Maryland says the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act shows Congress can still work in a bipartisan fashion to tackle affordability, arguing there are "many more opportunities" for lawmakers to do so. Republican Senator Roger Marshall of Kansas says the SAVE America Act is the one bill he would choose to pass if he could pass only one more in his Senate career, as President Trump presses Congress to advance the measure. Democratic Representative Sydney Kamlager-Dove of California says she is not prepared to support additional Pentagon funding without more answers from Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth on Iran and depleted munitions stockpiles. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Congress Passes Sweeping Housing Bill in Rare Bipartisan Accord
title_cn: 国会以罕见的两党协议通过了全面的住房法案
summary: The US House of Representatives on Tuesday passed the most significant housing legislation in decades on a 358-32 vote, sending to President Donald Trump’s desk a bill with rare bipartisan backing that’s aimed at showing action on voters’ affordability concerns.

title: Bessent Warns Against US Being at ‘Mercy’ of Foreign Chokepoint
title_cn: 贝森特警告美国不要对外国阻塞点“仁慈”
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said US economic statecraft policies will be guided in part by ensuring the nation addresses vulnerabilities to any adversary being able to curtail vital supplies.

title: UK Climate Watchdog Urges Removal of Green Levies From Bills
title_cn: 英国气候监管机构敦促取消账单中的绿色税
summary: The UK government must do more to lower electricity costs, including by removing green levies from energy bills, if it is to meet its net zero emissions target by mid-century, the country’s climate watchdog has said.

title: Rep. Kamlager-Dove: No 'Blank Check' for Pentagon
title_cn: 众议员卡姆拉格-多夫：五角大楼没有“空白支票”
summary: Democratic Representative Sydney Kamlager-Dove of California says she is not prepared to support additional Pentagon funding without more answers from Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth on Iran and depleted munitions stockpiles. She also says European allies raised concerns during her recent Brussels visit about US reliability on NATO, Ukraine and climate. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sen. Marshall Calls SAVE America Act His Top Priority
title_cn: 参议员马歇尔称拯救美国行动为首要任务
summary: Republican Senator Roger Marshall of Kansas says the SAVE America Act is the one bill he would choose to pass if he could pass only one more in his Senate career, as President Trump presses Congress to advance the measure. He also calls for "trust in the process" in Iran negotiations and says farmers will likely need more aid beyond any purchases Iran may make of US agricultural products. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)
